Agentix/SDK
DashboardFull DocsGitHub
Self-host path

TypeScript SDK for autonomous agent infrastructure.

Zero dependencies, fully typed, works in Node.js and browsers. Run the protocol in your own stack with full control over credentials, wallets, sessions, and agent executions.

Quickstart

Complete flow: init, register, wallet, session, execute

typescript
import { AgentClient, AGENT_PERMISSIONS } from "@agentix/sdk"

// Step 1: Initialize the client
const client = new AgentClient("http://127.0.0.1:3001")
await client.init()

// Step 2: Register an agent with ZK credentials
const registration = await client.registerAgent({
  orgName: "Acme Treasury",
  agentName: "Payout Agent",
  permissions: AGENT_PERMISSIONS.ALL,
  expiry: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 60 * 60 * 24 * 30
})

// Step 3: Deploy an ERC-4337 wallet
const wallet = await client.createWallet({ agentId: registration.agentId })

// Step 4: Create an on-chain session
const session = await client.createSession({ agentId: registration.agentId })

// Step 5: Execute actions
const result = await client.readFile(registration.agentId, "/data/config.json")
console.log(result.execution.result)

Execution Methods

Execute actions as autonomous agents

// Execute various actions as an autonomous agent

// Read file
await client.readFile(agentId, "/data/config.json")

// Write file
await client.writeFile(agentId, "/data/output.json", JSON.stringify({ status: "done" }))

// Execute command
await client.executeCommand(agentId, "npm", ["run", "build"], "/project/path")

// API call
await client.apiCall(agentId, "https://api.example.com/data", "GET")

// Sign transaction
await client.signTransaction(agentId, "0xRecipient...", "1000000000000000000", "0x")

// Custom action
await client.customAction(agentId, "my_action", { param1: "value" })
client.readFile()
client.writeFile()
client.executeCommand()
client.query()
client.apiCall()
client.signTransaction()
client.deployContract()
client.customAction()

Backend Endpoints

What the SDK calls internally

POST/v1/agents/provision

Provision organization + agent together.

POST/credentials

Register ZK credential commitment.

GET/v1/agents/:agentId/state

Get full agent state.

POST/wallets

Deploy ERC-4337 smart contract wallet.

POST/sessions

Create on-chain session with ZK proof.

POST/external-agents/:id/execute

Execute agent actions.

GET/external-agents/:id/executions

Get execution history.

GET/wallets/:address/whitelist

Get wallet whitelist.

Permissions (Bitmasks)

Combine with bitwise OR, check with bitwise AND

READ_FILE= 1

Read file contents

WRITE_FILE= 2

Write file contents

EXECUTE_COMMAND= 4

Run shell commands

QUERY= 8

Database queries

API_CALL= 16

HTTP API calls

SIGN_TRANSACTION= 32

Sign blockchain tx

DEPLOY_CONTRACT= 64

Deploy smart contracts

CUSTOM= 128

Custom actions

// Combine and check:
AGENT_PERMISSIONS.READ_FILE | AGENT_PERMISSIONS.WRITE_FILE // = 3
(permissions & AGENT_PERMISSIONS.WRITE_FILE) !== 0 // check
Lightweight
Zero Dependencies
Fully typed
TypeScript
ZK proofs
Security
ERC-4337
Wallet Standard

Stats & Monitoring

Track execution history and performance

getExecutions(agentId, limit)

Get execution history for an agent

getExecution(agentId, execId)

Get a specific execution by ID

getExecutionStats(agentId)

Get success rate and timing metrics

Ready to build?

Check the full documentation for complete API reference.
